title: Approval and Advertising Strategy for Collective Intelligence Conference
summary: The team discussed obtaining approval to present at the ACM Collective Intelligence Conference in September.
The team considered requesting support from LIS to advertise the new MASc in AI and CI at the conference.
decisions: Decided to seek approval for presenting at the Collective Intelligence Conference in September.
Decided to request support from LIS to advertise the new MASc in AI and CI at the conference.

actions.title: Request LIS support for advertising the MASc in AI and CI
actions.description: Draft and submit a request to LIS for support in advertising the MASc in AI and CI at the ACM Collective Intelligence Conference.

open_questions: What specific support from LIS is needed for the advertising?
